e -> 000
 s -> 0010
 h -> 0011
 i -> 0100
 n -> 0101
 v -> 0110000
 R -> 01100010000
 S -> 01100010001
 ; -> 0110001001
 ' -> 011000101
 H -> 011000110
 J -> 011000111000
 z -> 011000111001
 F -> 0110001110100
 L -> 0110001110101
 K -> 01100011101100
 M -> 01100011101101
 Z -> 01100011101110
 E -> 01100011101111
 j -> 01100011110
 ? -> 01100011111
 , -> 011001
 y -> 011010
 f -> 011011
 o -> 0111
 a -> 1000
 l -> 10010
 d -> 10011
 t -> 1010
 c -> 101100
 g -> 101101
 k -> 1011100
 A -> 1011101000
 G -> 10111010010
 N -> 101110100110
 Y -> 101110100111
 T -> 101110101
 - -> 101110110
 " -> 101110111
 -> 101111

 -> 110000
 w -> 110001
 r -> 11001
 m -> 110100
 u -> 110101
 " -> 110110000
 x -> 1101100010
 : -> 11011000110
 O -> 110110001110
 P -> 110110001111
 I -> 110110010
 W -> 11011001101
 q -> 11011001110
 ! -> 11011001111
 . -> 1101101
 b -> 1101110
 p -> 1101111
   -> 111
